settings.description: The modern farmhouse aesthetic has captivated homeowners, architects, and designers alike, blending rustic charm with contemporary sophistication. This design style, rooted in traditional American farmhouses, has evolved beyond its pastoral origins into a refined, high-end architectural movement. The modern farmhouse is no longer just about shiplap and exposed beams; it has become a nuanced style that embraces clean lines, thoughtful material choices, and an emphasis on natural textures.
settings.product_title: Coyote Craft Farmhouse Ledge, Coyote Foothouse Rubble Mixology
